Keilecafe Rotterdam – Social Summer Hangout in M4H

Rotterdam

Summertime neighborhood hangout spot with local spirit — simple drinks, friendly crowd, occasional DJ sets and no‑frills comfort that feels like your favourite go‑to.

Keilecafe is a Rotterdam summer favorite with simple drinks, social atmosphere and occasional DJ sets in a no-frills neighborhood setting.

Vierhavensstraat 46, 3029 BG Rotterdam
👯‍♀️Easygoing🎉Social🌞Golden Summertime
